text: Wherever the term “safety glazing material” is used in this article, it means safety glazing material of a type meeting requirements established by the department.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 12. EQUIPMENT OF VEHICLES [24000 - 28244]
### Chapter 4. Windshields and Mirrors [26700 - 26712]
##### § 26704

Wherever the term “safety glazing material” is used in this article, it means safety glazing material of a type meeting requirements established by the department.

*(Repealed and added by Stats. 1979, Ch. 723.)*

subsections.text: Wherever the term “safety glazing material” is used in this article, it means safety glazing material of a type meeting requirements established by the department.
